headline: Bored Billionaire Builds Life-Size Replica of His House... Inside His House
summary: The project includes a tiny version of his tiny problems.
fullBody: Tech mogul Reginald P. Overthinker completed construction of a perfect 1:1 scale replica of his mansion inside the original mansion. 'I wanted to see what it felt like to be me from the outside,' he explained. The project required 47 permits and one very confused building inspector.
